01-01.description: The first sunrise of the New Year, greeted from hilltops and shorelines across Japan.

02-01.description: Early hints of spring stir in the second month, as buds swell on sheltered plum branches. (02-01)

02-02.description: Early hints of spring stir in the second month, as buds swell on sheltered plum branches. (02-02)

02-03.description: The eve of the first day of spring; roasted soybeans are scattered to drive out evil and invite good fortune.

02-04.description: First day of spring in the traditional calendar; plum blossoms begin to open in sheltered valleys.

04-01.description: Cherry-blossom viewing — friends and families gather beneath blossoming trees for food, drink, and seasonal joy.

12-31.description: New Year's Eve — temple bells toll 108 times at midnight to cleanse the worldly desires of the old year.

ko.reading: はるかぜこおりをとく

ko.gloss: bush warblers sing in the mountains
fish emerge from under the ice

ko.reading: つちのしょううるおいおこる
かすみはじめてたなびく
そうもくめばえいずる
ko.gloss: plants and trees begin to bud

ko.reading: すごもりのむしとをひらく
すずめはじめてすくう
さくらはじめてひらく
かみなりすなわちこえをはっす
こうがんきたへかえる
にじはじめてあらわる
あしはじめてしょうず
しもやんでなえいずる
かいこおきてくわをはむ
くされたるくさほたるとなる
たかすなわちわざをならう
きりはじめてはなをむすぶ
つちうるおうてむしあつし
わたのはなしべひらく
てんちはじめてさむし
ko.gloss: heaven and earth begin to cool

ko.reading: こくものすなわちみのる
かみなりすなわちこえをおさむ
むしかくれてとをふさぐ
つばきはじめてひらく

ko.gloss: narcissus blooms and scents the air

ko.reading: きたかぜこのはをはらう
たちばなはじめてきばむ
そらさむくふゆとなる
なつかれくさしょうず
おおしかのつのおつる
ゆきわたりてむぎいずる
しみずあたたかをふくむ
ko.gloss: springs begin to move under ice

ko.reading: さわみずこおりつめる
にわとりはじめてとやにつく
